title: Spaceboi's Vanilla modpack
description: This is a mod pack that I use daily for any 1.19.3 vanilla gameplay
body:
This ModPack is what I use for when I play minecraft. I had some players come up to me and asked me what I used and after a few receast I have made this modpack for anyone that wants to use it to.

For performace and the base of this modpack I have used Fabuluosly Optimized modpack. And changed and Added quality of life improvements mods to it.

[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/fabulously-optimized_64h.png)](https://github.com/Fabulously-Optimized/fabulously-optimized)
